title: Microsoft faces a crisis of cutbacks and layoffs at Xbox
summary: Reports indicate project cancellations, the worst financial month in 26 years, and the possible closure of studios like Undead Labs.

title: IO Interactive suffers layoffs after Xbox's withdrawal from Project Fantasy
summary: The Hitman studio seeks new partners for its fantasy RPG after losing Microsoft funding.

title: Microsoft considers cancelling Marvel's Blade and closing Arkane Studios
summary: The studio behind Dishonored and its anticipated Blade project are on Xbox's list of possible cancellations.

title: Nintendo details Splatoon Raiders features ahead of its launch
summary: The single-player campaign-focused title showcases its weapons, enemies, and customization system in a Nintendo Direct.

title: Stop Killing Games hearing sparks controversy over ESA's stance
summary: The ESA deems community servers illegal, while California's video game preservation law fails by a single vote.

title: Oblivion Remastered confirms physical edition on Switch 2 for August 11
summary: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion will come to Nintendo's new console with the full game on the cartridge.

title: Original Baldur's Gate designer turned down the opportunity to make Baldur's Gate 4
summary: James Ohlen declined Hasbro's offer, considering it madness to compete with the massive success of Baldur's Gate 3.

title: Guns of Eschaton, the final game from Half-Life 2 artist Viktor Antonov, announced
summary: The acclaimed art director worked before his death on a Western-themed shooter soulslike that will come to Steam and consoles.

title: Valve talks about the future of Steam Machine and Steam Deck
summary: The company confirms there's no rush for a Steam Deck 2 and that they don't plan more front panels for Steam Machine.

title: GTA 6 developers seek union recognition from British government
summary: Rockstar Games has 10 business days to recognize the union or face an employment tribunal.

title: GTA 6 tops wishlists and fans speculate on new mechanics
summary: The game leads global pre-orders, fans theorize about a muscle-building system, and analysts believe it will mark the end of $70 games.

title: Netflix bets on video game adaptations and anime content
summary: The platform prepares a Persona series, premieres Super Mario, and adds new series, though it sparks controversy with its Willy Wonka AI.

title: Nintendo rumored to release a screen revision for Switch 2
summary: Multiple reports point to a possible LCD panel upgrade for the new console to improve its quality.

title: Turok: Origins looks spectacular in its new gameplay trailer
summary: Saber Interactive showcases the gameplay of the return of the dinosaur hunting saga ahead of its fall launch.

title: Growing rejection of generative artificial intelligence in video game development
summary: The Godot engine bans AI code due to lack of trust, and the Dragon Age writer denounces it as a plague.

title: Sony defends its PC games strategy and anticipates high cost for PS6
summary: Former PlayStation head comments that the goal of PC ports was not to make money, while the PS6 is expected to exceed $1000.

title: Love and Deepspace cancels new love interest due to fan fury
summary: The popular dating game removes the werewolf character after receiving massive complaints from the community.

title: Cyberpunk 2077 regains popularity and announces Edgerunners sequel
summary: The game is back in fashion coinciding with the release of the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 trailer.

title: Nivalis confirms release date for September 29
summary: The cyberpunk life simulator debuts a new name and promises a fall packed with content for players.

title: Star Wars reveals new galactic secrets and a curious controversy over its Monopoly
summary: A new book expands the lore of key planets, while fans debate whether Chewbacca is broken in the board game.
